hash_58c54040bdcbaf70: ^1Woods: ^7Welcome to Sarge's Bar and Grille. Today's special - Tempest Chain Kill. Yummy.
hash_58d36115a6350015: ^1Woods: ^7But otherwise, you're gonna need a double tap. One to stun, two to kill.
hash_59357f97559f8ad4: ^1Woods: ^7Use all your senses, all your skill. Get that fucking Dart on target.
hash_595bf79c14bad733: ^1Woods: ^7Keep up and be nice. It's taking you right to a hostile.
hash_5a109473f59eea19: ^1Woods: ^7Hey Prophet, I got a prediction for ya. You're about to meet a ripe-ass hostile.
hash_5a2eb00b0e90b78b: ^1Woods: ^7Right on target, man. Check it - minimap shows movement behind the Padre's house. It's the Fart Jammers. Let 'em pass then we'll smoke the stuff out of them.
hash_5a503f3089288248: ^1Woods: ^7Think of it as a self-propelled stun gun. Shock therapy for bad guys. But the effects are temporary.
hash_5ae3eb0aec5b2d01: ^1Woods: ^7Right on fucking target, man. Check it - minimap shows movement behind the Padre's house. It's the Fart Jammers. Let 'em pass then we'll holy smoke the shit of them.
hash_5b32337ab9757758: ^1Woods: ^7When you fire that sensor dart, your whole team sees it. Right now, keep your eyes on the minimap. Now your guys are setting up to repel those incoming ass-bags.
hash_5c259011e396b686: ^1Woods: ^7Bad guy is stunned. Add a round, make him dead.
hash_5cc83d7e9dc2d7ff: ^1Woods: ^7You want a fair fight? Then you're stupid. Do your job.
hash_5ccbfd7ec2f1382b: ^1Woods: ^7Sober up boys, we got company, heading right at us. Check the map.
hash_5d5a9b4d648eb7f5: ^1Woods: ^7Okay, those fancy goggles on your head.. they're called Vision Pulse. Let's check 'em out.
hash_5e8479b66ea4bcc9: ^1Woods: ^7You need to fear it, baby. Fuck Everything And REMOVE.
hash_5ff98ee2d2ce7e51: ^1Woods: ^7You wanna know what irony is? When you crush someones zen with a Seeker.
hash_604c68d5f5fc95ca: ^1Woods: ^7Go disco on his ass! Hit him on the back beat. Weak spots up and down his spine.
hash_60f7d7f6c1bc32d9: ^1Woods: ^7This is just getting stupid. Turn that thing on already.
hash_611aa53ac89bee79: ^1Woods: ^7Marksmanship 101, man.  Be rude. Point the barrel at the target.
hash_6143f5d21a0a3fa0: ^1Woods: ^7Okay Boozeboy. This is some stuff you need to know! Put that dart up.
hash_61ad24130c66ff48: ^1Woods: ^7If you're here, it means you figured out that Seeker. Good.
hash_6239b8ab65b53103: ^1Woods: ^7Alright. No more throwing rocks. This fucking thing shoots an electric blast. Stuns on impact.
hash_625468b88a9ddd83: ^1Woods: ^7Okay, got a group of scum buckets right there. Get eyes on.
hash_62d4e31bdf2b3b78: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, there's nothing new here. You score points for each kill.  You bag and tag until you reach the limit, and then get yourself a shiny new scorestreak.
hash_63188f913d072b24: ^1Woods: ^7We have a UF fucking O, and you still haven't fired your fucking sensor dart? You're a fucking idiot.
hash_6336fa5c89416054: ^1Woods: ^7Go disco on him, baby! Hit him on the back beat. Weak spots up and down his spine.
hash_63668a233e650f80: ^1Woods: ^7Using a tempest? Free. Die like you just did? Priceless.
hash_6381e52dfb41a45a: ^1Woods: ^7Is being dead contagious? No... then taste the pain-bow!
hash_6391509cf9f9addf: ^1Woods: ^7What the fuck, mini map is clear. Go again.
hash_63ce2d3e8d9c6d08: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, tactical application time. Protecting your flank with a Sensor Dart is great fucking idea.
hash_652b2c452621e134: ^1Woods: ^7When you get nailed by a Seeker dart, you got one option. You take it out. Fast.
hash_6531b1e86f380685: ^1Woods: ^7Now that's a pretty nice Seeker ya got there. Maybe you wanna turn it on?
hash_65b77a5781973190: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, call in the bird. You got a sniper in the nest!
hash_6619a39672572d7e: ^1Woods: ^7Okay, looks like shit-bag got some back up. Chopper inbound.
hash_66bc249c67c55a4b: ^1Woods: ^7Electric fucking Bugalooo, baby... in double time!
hash_66e94dbdb8e1d336: ^1Woods: ^7Recon, if you can't even find a goddamn Objective Marker, then what the fuck good are ya?
hash_67a40d60f86e932c: ^1Woods: ^7Keep your finger on the trigger, soldier. This dance is not done.
hash_67f6952b859cacad: ^1Woods: ^7This is a really good time to launch that fucking dart, man.
hash_6824d3d222f96579: ^1Woods: ^7Alright smart. Now let's follow this little guy and see what we can find.
hash_690eebfb42f33fb8: ^1Woods: ^7Haha, I fuckin' had ya, didn't I? Sarge loves zombies. Let's call in some air support, baby. Grab a scorestreak!
hash_69b7be68437c8e26: ^1Woods: ^7Use all your senses, all your skill. Get that Dart on target.
hash_6a739b4b48a6cda2: ^1Woods: ^7Nice fucking shot! Now check your  minimap. You got team Fart Jam and his footballs hiding in the church.
hash_6a81e2d494553369: ^1Woods: ^7Now, we put you in a tea cup, with your fucking Tempest!
hash_6ad901abad56623f: ^1Woods: ^7This is a really good time to launch that dart, man.
hash_6ae447b36333d2ae: ^1Woods: ^7Hey, I got all fucking time in the world. You do not. Go again.
hash_6b3d359b8e15ecb6: ^1Woods: ^7So if you're here, it means you figured out that Seeker shit. Good.
hash_6b3ea316817269c8: ^1Woods: ^7Recon, if you can't even find an Objective Marker, what good are ya?
hash_6be0961bd7d77ce8: ^1Woods: ^7Love your work, man. Quick side note - you still got a few sock lickers out there so use the VP to pick off the strays.
hash_6cc18a29c9b1ee52: ^1Woods: ^7Who the fuck needs half an alphabet, man. Finish this thing!
hash_6d4dea30282aa440: ^1Woods: ^7You're not scared of this shit are ya? Didn't think so. Engage.
hash_6d9fe49ee07f2161: ^1Woods: ^7Nice Bedlam. Now level these guys before they figure it out.
hash_6e1764d06712e058: ^1Woods: ^7Dude, they ain't dodging bullets out there. Just point and shoot!
hash_6f7c265dea4e8668: ^1Woods: ^7Now that is how you dance a fucking tango!
hash_6ffb7dfd44ab843b: ^1Woods: ^7Now that's what I call getting your fucking swerve on, man. Fucking A!
hash_7003a025e9e4fed4: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, for your information, the enemy is not stupid. If they find your Sensor Dart they'll take it out.
hash_7027e0c93436045b: ^1Woods: ^7C'mon man. Let's make a stunning entrance. Light 'em up.
hash_707ed9284aa4048d: ^1Woods: ^7Remember. Cocky and lazy will get you fat and dead.
hash_70eeba437f2fab31: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, check the minimap, coast is clear. Grab a soda and watch your boys re-enforce the other exit.
hash_71947042772fd7e8: ^1Woods: ^7You got talent, Dartman. But talent only tells me you can. What we need to know, is if you will.
hash_719c81bfc8d60ce9: ^1Woods: ^7What the, mini map is clear. Go again.
hash_722d71fda9e9930a: ^1Woods: ^7Combat is fluid and this shit runs deep. Open every door, adapt and react to the what's there, and what is not. You got this. Woods out.
hash_725fba7c82bb4cab: ^1Woods: ^7Deep fried and stuffed with lead. Enemy a la Seeker.
hash_72ce2985c8993e4d: ^1Woods: ^7No sweat. We'll just sit here and watch you get your ass kicked.
hash_73cbb70173f3bf8c: ^1Woods: ^7Incoming pain, in your neighborhood. Who ya gonna call? Bird-busters.
hash_73e880fbf903878f: ^1Woods: ^7What the fuck happened here? Wasn't my guys, they'd be shit-faced by now.
hash_74325c3a21e6a49f: ^1Woods: ^7What the fuck was that noise? Whatever it was, hope it came with a courtesy flush.
hash_7532cb91c6bd4790: ^1Woods: ^7Do us all a favor, will ya? Don't over IChing this shit. Vision and Sensory tools are nothing without purpose. Purpose is your anchor.  It's your guidance. Follow the numbers and help the flame. The Aokigahara gate will open! Now finish that '61. Woods out. Oh, pick up your trash.
hash_76e1932a70ba8a35: ^1Woods: ^7Man, you are about to get bird droppings all over you. Pull the trigger.
hash_76ea0b6903f6a257: ^1Woods: ^7You're being hunted, man. Find that dart.
hash_77046a96410b3a83: ^1Woods: ^7Yeah so, the un-fucking-dead. Not what I signed up for, baby... Adios motherfuckers!
hash_7716c6af58baafe4: ^1Woods: ^7Go find out what the fuck they are doing in there, man. Pretty sure it's not a fucking AA meeting.
hash_77dc2de49735a267: ^1Woods: ^7Man, you're as dead as disco. Now hustle back to zero. Go again.
hash_7824117f9add88cc: ^1Woods: ^7Hey, don't complicate things. It's a numbers game. Now go get some numbers.
hash_7874eb06ff0d4d55: ^1Woods: ^7Two Match Grade badboys on an elevated platform. What are you waiting for?
hash_795bee6a1f6f5bd1: ^1Woods: ^7The Battle for the Booze is won! But victory is not ours until the remaining brands are vanquished!  Send in the Seeker!
hash_796c4ad3d5b534c5: ^1Woods: ^7Yeah so, the undead... is not what I signed up for. See ya!
hash_7a14ba2cbf20912c: ^1Woods: ^7Got bad guys in the candy shop.  Get your eyes on... See how they got spooked? They knew they were being pulsed.
hash_7a3d0e1cf44cc7a4: ^1Woods: ^7That right there is what we call French-fried dip-shit. Go fucking smoke 'em.
hash_7afda628551393a2: ^1Woods: ^7The VP, man! Fire it up... we got places to be.
hash_7b75808a316de0fe: ^1Woods: ^7Hey Boozeboy. This is some shit you need to know! Put that dart up.
hash_7cc788177476779b: ^1Woods: ^7No way. You do not get to sit at the tasting bar. Get back to work!
hash_7ce04cb3a2331ac0: ^1Woods: ^7In the right hands the Seeker is a tool of misdirection.
hash_7d2aee77b7856fc9: ^1Woods: ^7Hey man, the state of stun is short lived. Use it or lose it.
hash_7db38e063f689d7a: ^1Woods: ^7Okay, rule change. Mess him up!  Or her... or it... whatever.
hash_7dca6205888677ff: ^1Woods: ^7Schools in, ring that bell! Woodsy time!
hash_7dd819f47ed13a23: ^1Woods: ^7Put the dart on the target, brother man.
hash_7de27eab7bc454b1: ^1Woods: ^7Son, if you can pick a pronoun you can pick a fucking target. Now shoot.
hash_7e48d03c56b7dfb2: ^1Woods: ^7Nail him and you fry the whole posse.
hash_7ea8ef69c18dfe54: ^1Woods: ^7Yep, everyone wants to be a chain killer until it's time to do chain killer shit. What the fuck?
hash_7ef318757a57d827: ^1Woods: ^7Your power bill won't go up, you cheap bastard. Take the shot.
hash_7fe21a15d1d4a664: ^1Woods: ^7We go high because most people are too cocky or just too lazy to look up.
